Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Pilot]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The Pilot's gifts evolve the ship's navigation and Subspace Drive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — A Pilot can provide enhancements to scanners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 41''' — The Pilot is a role within The Last Horizon associated with the stone tablet of the Pilot.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — The Pilot has a contract that prevents him from acting directly against other crew members.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — The Pilot carved his way out of an encirclement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — The narrator is the Captain of the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — The Captain refers to Omega as Pilot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — A Pilot is required to escape Zykaros in time.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
